About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 1989, Indbank Merchant Banking Services Ltd. is engaged in Merchant Banking, Stock Broking, Depository Participant and allied activities.
Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
The Company is a subsidiary of Indian Bank and is engaged in stock broking, depository participant services, distribution of mutual funds and other investment products, and merchant banking. It is a member of  and  (Equity & Derivatives segments), registered with NSDL and CDSL as a Depository Participant, and holds SEBI registration as a Merchant Banker. It is also registered with AMFI for mutual fund distribution. It provides depository services to institutional and retail clients, with
91,360 DP accounts
and
50,319 broking accounts.
